task.prompt: Implement a modal dialog with proper focus trap and Escape key dismissal

strong_code:
function Modal({open,onClose,children}){const ref=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{if(open)ref.current?.focus();const h=e=>{if(e.key==="Escape")onClose()};document.addEventListener("keydown",h);return()=>document.removeEventListener("keydown",h)},[open]);if(!open)return null;return
e.stopPropagation()} style={{background:"#fff",padding:"2rem",borderRadius:"8px"}}>{children}
}

{open&&
    {items.map((fn,i)=>
  • {fn();setOpen(false)}}>{i}
    • )}
}
}
